name: Saucy Franks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chili sauce and whole-berry cranberry sauce in a deep, 2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Add frankfurters.
3. Heat, covered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes.
4. Stir.
5. Heat, covered, an additional 10 minutes or until franks are heated through. Stir occasionally.
